refnamediv.refpurpose: Returns the 3D length of a linear geometry.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Returns the 3-dimensional or 2-dimensional length of the geometry if it is a LineString or MultiLineString. For 2-d lines it will just return the 2-d length (same as ST_Length and ST_Length2D)
Changed: 2.0.0 In prior versions this used to be called ST_Length3D

refsection.title: Examples
refsection.para: Return length in feet for a 3D cable. Note this is in feet because EPSG:2249 is Massachusetts State Plane Feet
